narrative:
Lake Twp Millbury Vill (precinct in Wood County) has 817 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
